---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: "Anna Poulton" 
---

# Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data


## Set up
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## Read in data

```{r}
lobster_traps <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")) %>%
    janitor::clean_names() 

head(lobster_traps)
colnames(lobster_traps)
str(lobster_traps)
```

## Clean data
Deals with missing values
```{r}
lobster_traps_clean = lobster_traps %>%
    dplyr::mutate(traps = ifelse(traps < 0, NA, traps)) 
    
not_napl = lobster_traps_clean %>%
    dplyr::filter(site != "NAPL")
```


# Exercise: Data Visualization

```{r}
ggplot(lobster_traps_clean) + geom_histogram(aes(x = traps)) +
    facet_wrap(~year) + 
    labs(y = "Count", x = "Traps") +
    theme_classic()
```
